name: Bean Soup with Dumplings
recipeIngredient: 1 can (15 ½ oz) kidney beans, rinsed and drained
1 can (15 oz) black beans, rinsed and drained
1 can (14 ½ oz) Mexican-style stewed tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan over medium heat, combine the first 13 ingredients.
2. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 1 hour or until vegetables are tender.
3. For dumplings, mix flour, cornmeal, baking powder, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
4. In another bowl, whisk together egg white, milk, and oil with the dry ingredients.
5. Drop mounds of the dough mixture onto boiling soup.
6. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 15-20 minutes without lifting the cover.
